query:
SELECT 
  SUM(smsCampaignSent = 1) as sent,
  SUM(smsCampaignSent = 0 OR smsCampaignSent IS NULL) as remaining,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM customers 
WHERE lastVisitDate >= '2025-01-01';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PAf3reHgcPDAtuw.root --database FqYRztyCVa3fHbrFjU6jAV --execute SELECT 
  SUM(smsCampaignSent = 1) as sent,
  SUM(smsCampaignSent = 0 OR smsCampaignSent IS NULL) as remaining,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM customers 
WHERE lastVisitDate >= '2025-01-01';
